xmlns:MD5Hex="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:Md5UniCode="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:Remove="Remove" xmlns:ReplaceText="ReplaceText" xmlns:StringLength="StringLength" xmlns:dateConversion="dateConversion" xmlns:myext="myext" xmlns:replace="replace" xmlns:replaceStr="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:rounding="rounding" xmlns:sringindex="sringindex" xmlns:strings="strings" xmlns:stringtext="stringtext" xmlns:truncateString="truncateString" extension-element-prefixes="datetime set math AppendZero EnDe MD5Hex Md5UniCode Remove ReplaceText StringLength dateConversion myext replace replaceStr rounding sringindex strings stringtext truncateString"> <xsl:import href="GLOBAL_FUNCLET_PATH"></xsl:import> <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" xalan:indent-amount="2" omit-xml-declaration="no"></xsl:output> <xsl:variable name="document" select="/"></xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="document_IN_PORT" select="document('IN_PORT')"></xsl:variable> <xsl:template match="/"> <AccountStmtRp> <ErrorCode> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountStmtRp/ErrorCode"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorCode> <ErrorMsg> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountStmtRp/ErrorMsg"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorMsg> <ListTxn> <xsl:for-each select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountStmtRp/ListTxn/TxnDetail"> <TxnDetail> <DrCr> <xsl:value-of select="./DrCr"></xsl:value-of> </DrCr> <TxnCcy> <xsl:value-of select="./TxnCcy"></xsl:value-of> </TxnCcy> <TxnContent> <xsl:value-of select="myext:replace(string(./TxnContent),string('#'),string('g'),string(' '))"></xsl:value-of> </TxnContent> <LastId> <xsl:value-of select="./LastId"></xsl:value-of> </LastId> <TxnAmount> <xsl:value-of select="./TxnAmount"></xsl:value-of> </TxnAmount> <TxnDate> <xsl:value-of select="java:com.fiorano.xslt.functions.datetime.DateConverter.convertDate_v2('yyyyMMdd','dd MMM yy',./TxnDate)"></xsl:value-of> </TxnDate> <TxnRefNo> <xsl:value-of select="./TxnRefNo"></xsl:value-of> </TxnRefNo> <DrAcctNo> <xsl:value-of select="./DrAcctNo"></xsl:value-of> </DrAcctNo> <CrAcctNo> <xsl:value-of select="./CrAcctNo"></xsl:value-of> </CrAcctNo> <DrAcctName> <xsl:value-of select="./DrAcctName"></xsl:value-of> </DrAcctName> <CrAcctName> <xsl:value-of select="./CrAcctName"></xsl:value-of> </CrAcctName> <TxnValDateTime> <xsl:value-of select="./TxnValDateTime"></xsl:value-of> </TxnValDateTime> <TxnTittle> <xsl:value-of select="myext:replace(string(./TxnTittle),string('#'),string('g'),string(' '))"></xsl:value-of> </TxnTittle> <Txntype> <xsl:value-of select="./Txntype"></xsl:value-of> </Txntype> </TxnDetail> </xsl:for-each> </ListTxn> </AccountStmtRp> </xsl:template> <!--The list of Extensions defined by user--> <lxslt:component prefix="myext" functions="replace"> <lxslt:script lang="javascript"><![CDATA[function compute(expr){ return eval(expr); }
function nextMillenium(){ d = new Date() //today's date mill=new Date(3000, 00, 01, 00, 00, 00) //Next millennium start date diff = mill-d //difference in milliseconds mtg = new String(diff/86400000) //calculate days and convert to string point=mtg.indexOf(".") //find the decimal point days=mtg.substring(0,point) //get just the whole days return "There are only " + days + " days remaining to the start of the next millennium."; }
function replace(input, pattern, flags, str){ return input.replace(new RegExp(pattern, flags), str); }]]></lxslt:script> </lxslt:component> </xsl:stylesheet>

match="/"> <AccountStmtRp> <ErrorCode> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns1:GetStatementResponse/ns1:status/ns1:code"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorCode> <ErrorMsg> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns1:GetStatementResponse/ns1:status/ns1:message"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorMsg> <ListTxn> <xsl:for-each select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns1:GetStatementResponse/ns1:transactions/ns1:transaction"><xsl:variable name="pos" select="position()"/> <TxnDetail><TxnCcy> <xsl:value-of select="./ns3:currency"></xsl:value-of> </TxnCcy> <Txntype> <xsl:value-of select="./ns3:txnType"></xsl:value-of> </Txntype> <TxnContent> <xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="(starts-with(./ns3:bakongDesc,'AC-'))"> <xsl:value-of select="concat(./ns3:txnTypeDescription,' Fee ')"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(starts-with(./ns3:bakongDesc,'SVGATE'))"> <xsl:value-of select="concat(./ns3:txnTypeDescription,' from Mobile Banking ')"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(starts-with(./ns3:txnTypeDescription,'PP'))"> <xsl:value-of select="concat(./ns3:bakongDesc,'')"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(string-length(./ns3:bakongDesc)!=('0'))"> <xsl:value-of select="concat(./ns3:bakongDesc,'')"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="concat(./ns3:txnTypeDescription,' ',./ns3:bakongDesc)"></xsl:value-of>
</xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of> </TxnContent> <LastId> <xsl:value-of select = "position()" /> </LastId> <DrCr> <xsl:value-of select="./ns1:drCr"></xsl:value-of> </DrCr><TxnAmount> <xsl:value-of select="./ns3:amount"></xsl:value-of> </TxnAmount> <TxnDate> <xsl:value-of select="./ns3:trxDt"></xsl:value-of> </TxnDate> <TxnRefNo> <xsl:value-of select="./ns3:reference"></xsl:value-of> </TxnRefNo> <DrAcctNo> <xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="starts-with(./ns3:debitAcc,'USD')"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="starts-with(./ns3:debitAcc,'000001966')"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="starts-with(./ns3:creditAcc,'000001578')"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(./ns3:debitAcc)=('000001558')"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="./ns3:debitAcc"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of> </DrAcctNo> <CrAcctName> <xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="starts-with(./ns3:creditAcc,'000001966')"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="starts-with(./ns3:creditAcc,'000001578')"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="starts-with(./ns3:txnTypeDescription,'BKG Outward Transfer')">
<xsl:value-of select="concat(./ns3:acboCrName,'Account No:',./ns3:acboCrAcc)"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when>
<xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="./ns3:cbsCrName"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of> </CrAcctName> <DrAcctName> <xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="starts-with(./ns3:debitAcc,'000001966')"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="starts-with(./ns3:creditAcc,'000001578')"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="./ns3:cbsDrName"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of> </DrAcctName> <CrAcctNo> <xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="starts-with(./ns3:creditAcc,'USD')"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="starts-with(./ns3:creditAcc,'000001966')"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="starts-with(./ns3:creditAcc,'000001578')"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(./ns3:creditAcc)=('000001558')"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="./ns3:creditAcc"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of> </CrAcctNo> <TxnTittle> <xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="(string(./ns3:txnTypeDescription)=('Mobile Banking FT') and string-length(./ns3:drCr)=('+') and string-length(./ns3:cbsCrName)!=('0'))"> <xsl:value-of select="concat('Received From ',./ns3:cbsDrName)"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(string(./ns3:txnTypeDescription)=('Mobile Banking FT') and string-length(./ns3:Credit)=('0') and string-length(./ns3:cbsCrName)!=('0'))"> <xsl:value-of select="concat('Transfer To ',./ns3:cbsCrName)"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(string(./ns3:txnTypeDescription)=('Mobile Banking FT') and string-length(./ns3:Credit)=('0') and string-length(./ns3:cbsCrName)=('0') and string(./ns3:bakongDesc)!=('CBC fee charge#'))"> <xsl:value-of select="'Topup to e-Wallet'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(string(./ns3:txnTypeDescription)=('Mobile Banking FT') and string-length(./ns3:Credit)=('0') and string-length(./ns3:cbsCrName)=('0') and string(./ns3:bakongDesc)=('CBC fee charge#'))"> <xsl:value-of select="'CBC Fee Charge'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(string-length(./ns3:txnTypeDescription)=('0'))"> <xsl:value-of select="concat(./ns3:description,' ',./ns3:bakongDesc)"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(starts-with(./ns3:bakongDesc,'AC-'))"> <xsl:value-of select="concat(./ns3:txnTypedescription,' Fee ')"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(string(./ns3:description)=('VISA Pay Dr') and starts-with(./ns3:bakongDesc,'SVGATE'))"> <xsl:value-of select="'Credit Card Payment'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(string(./ns3:txnTypedescription)=('BKG Outward Transfer'))"> <xsl:value-of select="concat('Transfer to Bakong ',./ns3:acboCrName)"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(string(./ns3:txnTypedescription)=('BKG Inwrd Transfer'))"> <xsl:value-of select="concat('Bakong Cash Deposit from ',./ns3:acbiDrName)"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(string(./ns3:txnTypedescription)=('Mobile Banking Bills Topup') or (string(./ns3:txnTypedescription)=('PPSolid Wast bill payment')))"> <xsl:value-of select="'Bill Payment'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(string(./ns3:description)=('ATM FtMobile Out') and (string(./ns3:creditAcc)=('000286644') or string(./ns3:creditAcc)=('000286645')))"> <xsl:value-of select="concat('Cash by Code at ',./ns3:bakongDesc)"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="concat(./ns3:txnTypedescription,' ',./ns3:bakongDesc)"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of> </TxnTittle> <TxnValDateTime> <xsl:value-of select="./ns3:trxTime"></xsl:value-of> </TxnValDateTime></TxnDetail> </xsl:for-each> </ListTxn> </AccountStmtRp> </xsl:template> </xsl:stylesheet>
